name: Dan Lipinski
subject: what’s your answer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible
body:
Rep. Dan Lipinski (IL-03), an engineer and former teacher, has a strong record of pragmatic problem-solving, fighting for affordable healthcare, and protecting working families. Your grassroots support makes Dan’s work possible, but if you wish to receive less emails please click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B-OhZXzNkEyZuye_OVc-jg2] . To unsubscribe, click here. [http://https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/aea7673a-7f2c-e911-b8b3-281878392e89/afa7673a-7f2c-e911-b8b3-281878392e89?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmE3NjczYS03ZjJjLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyCAG9Lx62jzswjXe6TfSbc0COpXsv7xuEHgzibaUV4=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com] http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/]
Hi Peter,
It’s been a decade since the Lilly Ledbetter Act became law, and while that has leveled the playing field, our work isn’t done yet. Which is why I’m proud to announce that again I’ll be an original co-sponsor of the Paycheck Fairness Act!
Before this new bill starts the process to become law, I want to hear from you.
Should Congress pass a law to strengthen pay fairness between men and women?
YES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TQthCmAS2UOO_BYwOB0oRg2] NO [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TQthCmAS2UOO_BYwOB0oRg2]
Not only is it common sense to make sure that men and women are paid equally for equal work, but it’s also another step in protecting and expanding the livelihoods of working families--and it’s the role of the government to ensure that the law of the land reflects that.
So I want to hear from you: Should Congress pass a law to strengthen pay fairness between men and women?
YES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TQthCmAS2UOO_BYwOB0oRg2] NO [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TQthCmAS2UOO_BYwOB0oRg2]
Thanks,
Dan
Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-footer?refcode=DL_EM_FR_footer&amount=25&recurring=auto]

Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible.
Unsubscribe Now [http://https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/aea7673a-7f2c-e911-b8b3-281878392e89/afa7673a-7f2c-e911-b8b3-281878392e89?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmE3NjczYS03ZjJjLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTJlODkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyCAG9Lx62jzswjXe6TfSbc0COpXsv7xuEHgzibaUV4=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]
Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558
United States

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: A GIANT AND ILLEGAL HOAX
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Just an excuse for Crooked Hillary’s epic loss. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a1d49841459900f392be2a8e771da3449236eaec774dc7919293004297076d6a6166f777f951bdc40071c32711b63f87bf)
---

Friend,

President Trump called for an end to the ridiculous partisan WITCH HUNT during his State of the Union Address:

_" An economic miracle is taking place in the United States -- and the only thing that can stop it are foolish wars, politics or ridiculous partisan investigations. If there is going to be peace and legislation, there cannot be war and investigation."_

The Chairman of the Senate Intelligence Committee, Richard Burr, just concluded that after 2 years of investigation, if they were to write a report based upon the facts that they have, then they wouldn't have anything that would suggest there was collusion by the Trump campaign.

_THIS IS AN ORCHESTRATED DEMOCRATIC HIT JOB TO HARASS PRESIDENT TRUMP_

| **[Please contribute $5 to our Official End the Partisan Witch Hunt Fund immediately to stand with President Trump in this fight.>> ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a1f9ea38f55a30ebb0ff13f6ccb3e77cb05f744371c4a5b808836367468abb3612fa34570e96fc9f6dc0b0b7fa91ffe39f)** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a16dfc4bc06744894a5ed0fe1f5948bda71556d1be932ec5fd73ac8f6fd82e9dcb5c1db51fa4080641abcbc845ec2a0b1e)
[CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a1d09ee136cc8d43c44f7917af20629296afff4cf6b7f70d9cc8266d07b5a6102ab88e39feec1c9db165aec806daeabfdf) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a19d27fe825c13eeeaeba47068975e57cfb3bf8ce4b7d3d5ca1e464e8f7fa764f1ea9c5116b3215d832881e9544d0886d4) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a12086310ea97eb483ff7edb1989b84cbea721bd7c23eb35ab5015966365e5405f7913ea9aa12f2b85d6851a7461213c54) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a1f264a42c654c2cda72029df2b0d3ce3d9db7f4b221a76de9ab7582764a454dcaa2e088bcd89977e063073bd30053e59d)
Democrats are nothing but a bunch of hypocrites inciting a WITCH HUNT to take down the President... **And for one simple reason: He _wants to put America FIRST._**

The witch hunt won't be over today. It won't be over tomorrow. We _MUST_ keep fighting. Our country is at stake.

****[Please contribute $5 to our Official End the Partisan Witch Hunt Fund immediately to stand with President Trump in this fight.>> ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a1d133ec20acab084b4e28a491c15db1e4fb1e94461598630fc73458b17b3e2003bc5e985f7dcfc0447188f9f02b9d4d21)****

Thanks,
TRUMP 2020
**[CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f65c0c93054a06a10a6daf698ae9b55a55d9fc801318e831089f02b8a0f2ad6ec98b93df27ac408e81bba4035c85fceddd54234da96599f0)**

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: the next 72 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Monday at MIDNIGHT is the last fundraising deadline before the Public Advocate election on February 26.

Peter, Monday at MIDNIGHT is the last fundraising deadline before the Public Advocate election on February 26.
With 17 candidates running, it's clear that this race could be determined by a handful of votes -- that means every dollar counts.
**Jumaane Williams isn't taking money from big developers, corporate interests, or real estate PACs, so it 's up to **_**us**_**, the grassroots, to step up and help him cross the finish line. **
**[Jumaane's campaign has set a goal of raising $7,200 in 72 hours from small donors -- can you make a donation of $5 or any amount now? Your gift will be matched 8-to-1>>](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78095b/6e822e2f/1df5fc77/4173b6c2/2975561417/VEsH/ "https://www.nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new")**
For years, Jumaane and I have been speaking out and standing up against big-money corruption and corporate influence on our government.
Now, with the IDC obliterated, the recent spate of progressive action out of Albany, and the #scAmazon deal on the rocks, it feels like we're on the brink of meaningful, tangible change.
**But if the real estate lobby and big donors are able to drown out Jumaane 's bold message and install their choice for Public Advocate on February 26, it will be a MAJOR setback in that fight.**
[**The next 72 hours are make-or-break for this campaign. Remember, your donation will be matched 8-to-1 because of public financing reform Jumaane helped pass. Anything you can give gets us closer to victory -- chip in now >>**](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78095b/6e822e2f/1df5fc77/4173b6c2/2975561417/VEsE/ "https://www.nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new")
Thank you so much for your continued support,
\-- Zephyr

[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78095b/6e822e2f/1df5fc77/4173b6c2/2975561417/VEsF/ "https://www.nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78095b/6e822e2f/1df5fc77/4173b6c3/2975561417/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78095b/6e822e2f/1df5fc77/4173b6c4/2975561417/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Short month. Short message. Big goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | February is the shortest month of the year -- which means it's our tightest deadline to reach our $50,000 monthly goal. Peter that might seem like a big goal. But if we miss these goals, we won't have the resources we need to keep building this grassroots movement, keep fighting for policies that respect the dignity of work, or help Democrats win victories in 2020. **[Less time means we just have to work harder to reach our goal. If you can, rush in $5, $10, or match our $26 average online contribution today.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc1b/4462dc26/8e9a4624/201ed303/2639341841/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190209?refcode=sbe190209_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc1b/4462dc26/8e9a4624/201ed302/2639341841/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190209?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe190209_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc1b/4462dc26/8e9a4624/201ed302/2639341841/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190209?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe190209_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc1b/4462dc26/8e9a4624/201ed302/2639341841/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjA5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190209?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe190209_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc1b/4462dc26/8e9a4624/201ed303/2639341841/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMjA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190209?refcode=sbe190209_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Why we went to Littleton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
It doesn't matter who I'm fighting against, it's who I'm fighting for!
| | | [](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769db/2ae112ef/170c4c82/357a6b4d/1096148532/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
---
Peter,

I'm writing to tell you about a moment from my campaign visit to New Hampshire last weekend.

We were in Littleton, and I had just gotten up in front of the room at a senior center. I could see right away everyone was eager to talk and share their stories. I was the first candidate to go to the North Country, and I went because that's what this campaign is about: showing up for people, asking questions and listening to what they have to say.

As we traveled early in this campaign, a lot of the same issues came up: high costs of health care and child care, the opioid crisis, immigration and uncertainty over providing for their families and planning for the future. There's a lot that's weighing on people. And the president just isn't helping. I'm running because I will.

The trip was full of special moments like that. Have a look:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/nh-video?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2759-fr-non-abel-nd-v1")
At its core, public service is about helping people. We need to do what's right for the people who sent us to serve. This is what I've always done. I've never backed down from a fight before, and hearing these stories, I won't back down from this one, either.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Kirsten
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Give $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2759-fr-non-abel-nd-v1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")

clean_body: It doesn't matter who I'm fighting against, it's who I'm fighting for! | | | "" Peter, I'm writing to tell you about a moment from my campaign visit to New Hampshire last weekend. We were in Littleton, and I had just gotten up in front of the room at a senior center. I could see right away everyone was eager to talk and share their stories. I was the first candidate to go to the North Country, and I went because that's what this campaign is about: showing up for people, asking questions and listening to what they have to say. As we traveled early in this campaign, a lot of the same issues came up: high costs of health care and child care, the opioid crisis, immigration and uncertainty over providing for their families and planning for the future. There's a lot that's weighing on people. And the president just isn't helping. I'm running because I will. The trip was full of special moments like that. Have a look: "" At its core, public service is about helping people. We need to do what's right for the people who sent us to serve. This is what I've always done. I've never backed down from a fight before, and hearing these stories, I won't back down from this one, either. Thanks for being a part of this, Kirsten If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Jason Yates
subject: SURVEY: What did you think of the SOTU?
body:
| | What Administration priority is most important to you?
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRh8hiUuPoSN_I-P-OsDnF2LrufPstLKfOuUtgkIsam8TpnOD5U6bVBSoHkI-XeDNPN2aURqMoJlrllYnav1xj8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190209srv01&n=1)
| Peter, President Trump stood before a divided Congress and the nation on Tuesday to deliver the State of the Union address. The theme of his speech was “choosing greatness.” Trump shared the accomplishments of his administration and the policy items on his agenda moving forward. We want to know what you thought of the speech and the President’s top policy priorities. **Please take our survey!** Did you watch the State of the Union Address? [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRh8hiUuPoSN_I-P-OsDnF2LrufPstLKfOuUtgkIsam8TpnOD5U6bVBSoHkI-XeDNKokhnFgOlrQo4OWkYgLQr4gijaqLktkEP9qXx37gUNP2J5pv6P_-9CsRJ-sm0ugU4zoxtDdjo8UybVLFOcNPoo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190209srv01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRh8hiUuPoSN_I-P-OsDnF2LrufPstLKfOuUtgkIsam8TpnOD5U6bVBSoHkI-XeDNKokhnFgOlrQo4OWkYgLQr4gijaqLktkEP9qXx37gUNP2J5pv6P_-9CsRJ-sm0ugU9gHFM6pQGyNks5Gk8Zzsk0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190209srv01&n=3) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRh8hiUuPoSN_I-P-OsDnF2LrufPstLKfOuUtgkIsam8TpnOD5U6bVBSoHkI-XeDNKokhnFgOlrQo4OWkYgLQr4gijaqLktkEP9qXx37gUNP2J5pv6P_-9CsRJ-sm0ugU4Dyv1oHwicAU69_BT7GpmTf8aEO6kW9qof7mayDrRXJaOgLoP_CfEM0HAePt2bq3755pO0u7OQRXwEmduccUGG8S-a9K9bOB96CqNCerlZ_qnNOFJOf9cHt53AX6ePkNw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190209srv01&n=4) **United. name: Michael Render, pka Killer Mike
subject: Throwing out the status quo
body:
When I was tempted to disengage from national politics, Our Revolution's President Nina Turner called me up and said, "you are going to stay engaged."
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef3c/1546348515/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
When I was tempted to disengage from national politics, Our Revolution's President Nina Turner called me up and said, "you are going to stay engaged."

...So I did.

I started filming my new show _Trigger Warning_ on Netflix, which is about questioning the status quo. Challenging assumptions. Offering an alternative path forward as a people and as a nation.

**Our Revolution is throwing out the status quo too.** No more "incremental progress" bull****. It's time for a wholesale political revolution.

**[Make a $5 donation to Our Revolution so they can register voters, recruit volunteers, and continue throwing out the status quo.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef3f/1546348515/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-grassroots?refcode=em190209-a&noskip=true")**

And know this: If Bernie runs, I'll be running right along with him. Because **to put out fire, you need water.** The only way to change the person in the White House is to elect a person who is the exact antithesis of him. **The answer is not a middle-ground Democrat or neoliberal, the answer is electing someone who is the exact opposite -- Senator Bernie Sanders.**

[**Chip in $5 so Our Revolution can grow their grassroots organizing efforts to elect the progressive candidate this country needs.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef3f/1546348515/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-grassroots?refcode=em190209-a&noskip=true")

In solidarity,

Michael Render, pka Killer Mike
Musician, Activist & Businessman
****[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef3f/1546348515/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-grassroots?refcode=em190209-a&noskip=true")****
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef3e/1546348515/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef39/1546348515/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef38/1546348515/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a5c8/bed43eb/9d4152c9/75fbef3b/1546348515/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"President Trump in his State of the Union address Tuesday night issued a call for unity and an end to the political divisiveness." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ae652f79b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [With Pitch for Unity, Trump Urges Republicans and Democrats to ‘Choose Greatness’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2691ce8214&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“President Trump in his State of the Union address Tuesday night issued a call for unity and an end to the political divisiveness that has ensnared Washington,” Melissa Quinn reports. During the speech—with its theme of “choosing greatness”—President Trump laid out five priorities that should unite both parties in Washington: “American jobs and fair trade, rebuilding the nation’s infrastructure, reducing the price of healthcare and prescription drugs, creating a safe and lawful immigration system, and pursuing a foreign policy agenda that ‘puts America’s interests first.’”
---
|
---
| [Newt Gingrich: Trump's State of the Union Changed History on Tuesday Night](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b30faf7768&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Every once in a while a speech is so effective and powerful it changes the trajectory of history. President Trump’s 2019 State of the Union address was that kind of speech,” former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich writes. “The emotions of Tuesday night matched anything President Reagan achieved in his addresses to Congress.”
---
|
---
| [EDITORIAL: Trump's State of the Union Speech Probably Ranks Among History's Best](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4b045c7b0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Gazette_
“Leading up to Tuesday night, we heard about the president’s intention to unify a country seldom so divided. So we expected a lot of easy talk about holding hands and trying to get along. This was more than words, at some points becoming an event that included women in House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s caucus cheering the president as if they supported him,” _The Gazette_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| [Three-Quarters Approve of Trump Speech: Polls](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f3552c522&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
Tal Axelrod reports that roughly three-quarters of American viewers approved of President Trump’s State of the Union address, according to CNN and CBS News polls. “Seventy-six percent approved of the speech in the CBS poll, with 24 percent saying they disapproved,” Axelrod writes. The most telling stat: CBS found that “about 82 percent of independents in that survey who watched the speech liked what they heard.”
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump: Empower Women to Foster Freedom](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12629e6dd1&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
This week, President Trump signed a “memorandum establishing the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or W-GDP,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes. “This initiative aims to help 50 million women in developing countries realize their economic potential by 2025 . . . Expanding women’s economic participation has the potential to boost global economic output by an additional $12 trillion by 2025.”
---
|
---
| [HHS Secretary Azar: How Team Trump is Bringing Drug Prices Down](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb5d337a31&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“As Americans heard Tuesday in the State of the Union Address, the president is committed to improving fairness and transparency in health care,” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar writes. “The president is going to keep charging ahead with delivering better care at more transparent, lower prices. That’s what it looks like to put American patients first, and that’s what he will deliver.”
---
|
---
| [Transportation Secretary Chao: Dems and GOP Should Join With Trump to Fund Infrastructure Improvements](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29f98abd75&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
Throughout the 20th century, infrastructure was essential to growing America into one of the most powerful economies in the world. Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao writes that it’s time for both Democrats and Republicans to join with President Trump to fund infrastructure improvements. “Today, aging and insufficient infrastructure threatens to impede America’s economic growth and impact quality of life in many areas.”
---
|
---
| [Time for the World to Get Behind David Malpass for World Bank President](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ae1dc50e86&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“The World Bank is an important institution and is often underappreciated and misunderstood in Washington D.C. It’s clear that David Malpass understands what the World Bank is and what it can do,” Daniel Runde writes. “Given that the U.S. has put forward a strong candidate, now would be the time for Japan, Europe, and other allied countries of the United States to come forward and support candidate Malpass.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb185e677c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6da7448268&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cfe341c721)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: AmyKlobuchar.com
subject: See you tomorrow! Psst -- check out this email for parking details.
body:
Peter,

Amy is very excited you're able to join her tomorrow as she makes a big announcement! We'll have hot chocolate, cider, music, and more. Please make sure you dress for the weather and don't forget to bring a friend or two.

Below are the details that you'll need for tomorrow's event:
**When:**
Sunday, February 10, 2019
Doors open at 1:00PM; Program begins at 1:30PM

**Where:**
Boom Island Park, 724 Sibley St. NE, Minneapolis, MN 55413
**[Getting to Boom Island Park](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=siL5T4AV9OCRUliotq%2BTmYggdDwIhrGY)** \-- Boom Island Park is in the heart of Minneapolis, located off of beautiful bike paths and convenient bus routes. Attendees are encouraged to rideshare, bike, walk, or use public transportation. Free event parking is also available in the nearby lots listed below.

**Event Parking (see the map below):**
* Corner of 8th Ave. NE and Sibley St. NE
* Corner of Marshall St. and 8th Ave. NE
* Corner of Marshall St. and 9th Ave. NE
* Corner of Broadway St. and Marshall St. NE

**Rideshare Pick-Up/Drop-Off Location:**
If you're interested in taking a rideshare to this event, you'll put in BF Nelson Park as the drop-off location -- the address is 434 NE Main St., Minneapolis, MN 55413.
---
Thank you again for joining Amy for her big announcement. It is sure to be a day to remember.

See you tomorrow!

\-- Team Klobuchar

****
****
****
****
****
**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the email list, please click here.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=o1Ou7OQ1Bt4rifsKUa%2FrCIggdDwIhrGY)
P.O. Box 18360, Minneapolis, MN 55418
Paid for by AFA Inc.
**
** **
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Jumaane Williams
subject: Fwd: the next 72 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
As a tenant organizer, I saw firsthand how the real estate lobby uses loopholes to squeeze every dollar out of the poorest New Yorkers -- and how they buy off politicians to keep those loopholes in pl

Peter: As usual, Zephyr is spot on.
**If you 're able, please donate $5 to our campaign before midnight on Monday -- use this link: [nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780958/6e822e2f/1dfbd928/4173b51e/3315156694/VEsH/ "https://www.nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new")**
As a tenant organizer, I saw firsthand how the real estate lobby uses loopholes to squeeze every dollar out of the poorest New Yorkers -- and how they buy off politicians to keep those loopholes in place.
The February 26 election isn't just about me. It's about who New York City is for -- just the wealthy and powerful, like Jeff Bezos and Andrew Cuomo? Or can this city be for ALL of us, a progressive beacon for the rest of the country to follow?
[**This campaign is BY and FOR the people of New York City -- no real estate, corporate or big developer money. That makes your support even more critical: Chip in $5 or any amount and your donation will be matched 8-to-1 >>**](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780958/6e822e2f/1dfbd928/4173b51e/3315156694/VEsE/ "https://www.nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new")
Thank you for everything you do, Peter. #ItsTime #LetsGo
\-- Jumaane Williams

**PREVIOUS EMAIL FROM ZEPHYR TEACHOUT:**
Peter, Monday at MIDNIGHT is the last fundraising deadline before the Public Advocate election on February 26.
With 17 candidates running, it's clear that this race could be determined by a handful of votes -- that means every dollar counts.
**Jumaane isn't taking money from big developers, corporate interests, or real estate PACs, so it 's up to **_**us**_**, the grassroots, to step up and help him cross the finish line. **
**[The campaign has set a goal of raising $7,200 in 72 hours from small donors -- can you make a donation of $5 or any amount now? Your gift will be matched 8-to-1>>](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780958/6e822e2f/1dfbd928/4173b51e/3315156694/VEsF/ "https://www.nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new")**
For years, Jumaane and I have been speaking out and standing up against big-money corruption and corporate influence on our government.
Now, with the IDC obliterated, the recent spate of progressive action out of Albany, and the #scAmazon deal on the rocks, it feels like we're on the brink of meaningful, tangible change.
**But if the real estate lobby and big donors are able to drown out Jumaane 's bold message and install their choice for Public Advocate on February 26, it will be a MAJOR setback in that fight.**
[**The next 72 hours are make-or-break for this campaign. Remember, your donation will be matched 8-to-1 because of public financing reform Jumaane helped pass. Anything you can give gets us closer to victory -- chip in now >>**](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780958/6e822e2f/1dfbd928/4173b51e/3315156694/VEsC/ "https://www.nycvotes.org/campaigns/jumaanewilliams/contributions/new")
Thank you so much for your continued support,
\-- Zephyr

clean_body: As a tenant organizer, I saw firsthand how the real estate lobby uses loopholes to squeeze every dollar out of the poorest New Yorkers -- and how they buy off politicians to keep those loopholes in pl Peter: As usual, Zephyr is spot on. If you 're able, please donate $5 to our campaign before midnight on Monday -- use this link: "" As a tenant organizer, I saw firsthand how the real estate lobby uses loopholes to squeeze every dollar out of the poorest New Yorkers -- and how they buy off politicians to keep those loopholes in place. The February 26 election isn't just about me. It's about who New York City is for -- just the wealthy and powerful, like Jeff Bezos and Andrew Cuomo? Or can this city be for ALL of us, a progressive beacon for the rest of the country to follow? "" Thank you for everything you do, Peter. #ItsTime #LetsGo \-- Jumaane Williams PREVIOUS EMAIL FROM ZEPHYR TEACHOUT: Peter, Monday at MIDNIGHT is the last fundraising deadline before the Public Advocate election on February 26. With 17 candidates running, it's clear that this race could be determined by a handful of votes -- that means every dollar counts. Jumaane isn't taking money from big developers, corporate interests, or real estate PACs, so it 's up to us, the grassroots, to step up and help him cross the finish line. "" For years, Jumaane and I have been speaking out and standing up against big-money corruption and corporate influence on our government. Now, with the IDC obliterated, the recent spate of progressive action out of Albany, and the #scAmazon deal on the rocks, it feels like we're on the brink of meaningful, tangible change. But if the real estate lobby and big donors are able to drown out Jumaane 's bold message and install their choice for Public Advocate on February 26, it will be a MAJOR setback in that fight. "" Thank you so much for your continued support, \-- Zephyr "" * Paid for by Zephyr for NY 1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035
